failure_story: Acquisition and activity-driven fee growth is mistaken for durable organic economics; debt and share issuance fund expansion while digital projects remain uncontracted and the premium multiple compresses.
earliest_warning_signals: Revenue per acre stalls after acquisition cohorts season.
Free-cash conversion deteriorates after normalized maintenance and acquisition capital.
Alpha Digital lacks an executed economics disclosure at the next refresh.
forensic_checks: Bridge revenue by fee activity and acreage cohort.
Reconcile adjusted EBITDA to owner cash including recurring maintenance needs.
Audit Up-C ownership, NCI, debt, tax distributions, and all option beneficiary terms.
unresolved_items: No public executed Alpha Digital agreement discloses LB's net economics.
Public disclosure does not fully separate recurring fee growth from price, mix, acquisitions, and one-time activity across a cycle.
A complete per-share Up-C, NCI, tax-distribution, debt, and future-dilution waterfall remains outstanding.
